entity.summary: Native Elys Network decentralized trading platform combining AMM swaps and liquidity pools with perpetual leveraged trading, collateral management, pool-health controls, and integrated spot and derivatives execution.
entity.notes: Current first-party Elys application endpoint is reachable. The official `elys-network/elys` chain implementation contains AMM swap logic and detailed perpetual-trading specifications covering leverage, collateral, pool assets, swap logic, pool health, and liquidation. Confidence is medium because the public documentation site is currently thin and partly template-like, so this record relies on the live app, first-party implementation repository, and June 2026 DEX discovery source.

evidence.title: Elys Network application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable and exposes the active Elys Network DeFi product surface.

evidence.title: Elys perpetual trading mechanism
evidence.notes: First-party chain specification documents Elys perpetual leveraged trading, collateral, synthetic liabilities, custody assets, swap logic, pool health management, liquidation thresholds, and AMM dependency.

evidence.title: Elys DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus source identifies Elys DEX in the DEX category, providing current exchange-registry corroboration alongside the live first-party application and chain implementation evidence.
